commit_scope: Add a real channel-lens value example that combines the phonemic-energetic lens with gematria code and JSON grammar.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh --binary form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/grammars/gematria.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/gematria-channel.fk form-stdlib/tests/channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk
local_validation.summary: channel-symbol-lens-value-band.fk proves a concrete example: ahava enters as a source-attributed phonemic-energetic offer; gematria reads ahava as value 13 and expands it to echad through shared content address; JSON carries the observation report; the channel sensing receipt records success, attribution, expansion, surprise, circulation, vitality, and chosen next contact. Source and binary sibling kernels both return 11111.

phase_gate.reason: Local value-example proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A concrete channel proof now shows value appearing when a source-attributed phonemic-energetic lens offer is combined with gematria code and JSON grammar.
test_flows: Send ahava as a source-attributed phonemic-energetic lens offer through CHANNEL-MSG.
Read ahava through gematria as value 13 and expand it to echad through shared content address.
Parse a JSON observation report that carries word, code, value, expansion, grammar, and new learning.
Return a CHANNEL-SYMBOL-LENS-SENSING receipt that records the observed expansion, vitality, circulation, and next contact.
